since_last: 46% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.17%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 46% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.57% · BTC -1.46% · Gold +0.27% · Nasdaq100 -1.89%. 46% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.17%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.17%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MGNI is the standout at +12.72%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +12.72%, TLN +6.15%, ASML +4.20%, MRVL +3.65%, AMAT +3.55%. Laggards: SNAP -9.46%, CRNC -6.21%, SMR -5.64%, OKLO -4.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.49% at $204.81
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
